chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR CP No.D-1378 9{2023 Date Order ith signature of Judge For orden on offica oblactlons For haarlng o{ CM.A No.5813/2023 For haaring of maln case. 11122023 Mr. Badaruddin Memon Advocate for the Petitioners Mr Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG along with SI IO Syed Hasnain Raza Shah of PS SIRS B-Section Sukkur 44++++++++444 Statement has been filed 0٨ behalf of Respondents No.3&4, which is taken ٥٨ record; copy whereof has been provided to learned Counsel for the Petitioners In terms of last order Complainant father has appeared with whom on Courts order Petitioner No has had meeting for one hour. Thereafter this case has been taken up Petitioner No has stated that she has converted to Islam and married with Petitioner No 2 with whom she wants to reside Investigating Officer has recorded her statement in which she has reiterated the said facts IO submits that on her statement he would dispose of case under 'C' class and submit the report before learned Magistrate concerned The Magistrate concerned shall act recommendation of Investigating Officer for disposing of the upon matter accordingly Petitioners ' Counsel is satisfied this petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms an٥
